payload.answer: I can’t safely rewrite this as a durable memory because “the other one” is ambiguous. Choose how you want to repair it.
citations: /brain remember He prefers the other one.
repair_options: Clarify what “the other one” refers to, then rewrite the memory with the specific preference.
Keep the existing memory unchanged and do not apply a rewrite.
Replace the vague wording with a more specific version only if you provide the exact referent.
Store this as a separate ambiguous note instead of rewriting the current memory.
